why.title: Why people switch to Chatforia
why.subtitle: Chatforia gives you a real phone number, smart translation, and a clear path to go ad-free when you’re ready.

textnow.title: Chatforia vs TextNow
textnow.body: Lighter ads on Free, a simple Plus upgrade when you’re ready, and Premium tools TextNow doesn’t offer.

voice.title: Chatforia vs Google Voice
voice.body: Modern app, global-first design, and built-in translation instead of old-school call forwarding.

messengers.title: Chatforia vs chat apps
messengers.body: Text real phone numbers — not just other app users — with AI and status built in. Great if you’re coming from apps like TextFree or TextMe.

feature.aiTools: AI vositalari (yozuvlarni qayta yozish, javoblar, xulosalar)

why.disclaimer: Comparison based on publicly available information and may change over time. Other free-texting apps like TextFree or TextMe are generally similar to TextNow.

free.a: Ha. Bepul rejim Chatforia raqami, qo'ng'iroq qilish va xabar almashishni reklama bilan o'z ichiga oladi. Xohlagancha Bepul rejimda qolishingiz yoki reklama olib tashlash va qo'shimcha funksiyalarni ochish uchun yangilashingiz mumkin.

plusPremium.q: Plus va Premium o'rtasidagi farq nima?
plusPremium.a: Plus reklamalarni olib tashlaydi va xabarlar tarixini uzaytiradi — kundalik foydalanish uchun ideal. Premium esa qo'shimcha sozlamalar, matnni qayta yozish va javob berish uchun sun'iy intellekt vositalari hamda ko'p foydalanuvchilar uchun ustuvor qo'llab-quvvatlashni taqdim etadi.

esim.a: Chatforia Mobile global eSIM qamrovidan foydalanadi. Mavjudlik mamlakatingiz va qurilmangizga bog'liq. Ilovada faollashtirish paytida qo'llab-quvvatlanadigan variantlarni ko'rasiz.

cancel.q: Rejalashtirishni istalgan vaqtda bekor qilishim yoki o'zgartirishim mumkinmi?
cancel.a: Ha. Ilovadagi to'lov sahifasidan obunasini boshqarishingiz yoki bekor qilishingiz mumkin. O'zgarishlar joriy to'lov davringiz oxirida kuchga kiradi.

family.a: Oilaviy paketlar bir nechta Chatforia hisoblari o'rtasida umumiy ma'lumotlar havzasini yaratadi. Bitta kishi hisobni to'laydi , va siz a'zolarni taklif qilishingiz yoki olib tashlashingiz hamda har bir kishi uchun limitlar belgilashingiz mumkin.

howItWorks.title: How Chatforia Works
howItWorks.intro: Chatforia is designed to make communication simple, fast, and accessible. Getting started takes just a few steps.
howItWorks.step1Desc: Sign up using your email or username to create your Chatforia account.
howItWorks.step2Desc: Connect with others by selecting contacts or starting new chats.
howItWorks.step3Desc: Messages are delivered quickly to provide a smooth communication experience.
howItWorks.step4Desc: Built-in translation helps users communicate across different languages.
howItWorks.step5Desc: Manage your preferences, contacts, and communication settings.

safety.title: Xavfsizlik va Jamiyat Qoidalari
safety.intro: Chatforia barcha foydalanuvchilar uchun xavfsiz va hurmatli muhitni saqlashga sodiq. Ushbu qoidalar har bir kishi uchun ijobiy tajribani ta'minlashga yordam beradi.
safety.respectDesc: Foydalanuvchilardan hurmat bilan muloqot qilishlari kutiladi. Qo'rqitish, haqorat qilish yoki zararli xatti-harakatlarga yo'l qo'yilmaydi.

tools.block: Block users to prevent further interaction

safety.enforcementDesc: We may take action against accounts that violate these guidelines, including warnings, restrictions, or permanent removal from the platform.

whyMessaging.title: Nega xabar almashish platformalari avvalgidan ham muhimroq
whyMessaging.intro: Xabar almashish platformalari bugungi dunyoda muloqot uchun eng muhim vositalardan biriga aylandi. Shaxsiy suhbatlardan tortib ishbilarmonlik aloqalarigacha, xabar almashish ilovalari odamlarga darhol va samarali bog'lanish imkonini beradi.
whyMessaging.everydayDesc: Insonlar do'stlari, oilasi va hamkasblari bilan kundalik muloqot uchun xabar almashish ilovalariga tayanadi. Tez yangilanish bo'lsin yoki uzoq suhbat, xabar almashish aloqada bo'lish uchun qulay va moslashuvchan usulni taqdim etadi.
whyMessaging.speedDesc: Xabar almashish platformalarining asosiy afzalliklaridan biri ularning tezligidir. Xabarlar darhol yetkaziladi, bu foydalanuvchilarga real vaqtda muloqot qilish imkonini beradi. Ushbu darajadagi qulaylik xabar almashishni ko'plab odamlar uchun afzal muloqot usuliga aylantirdi.
whyMessaging.globalDesc: Xabar almashish platformalari butun dunyo bo'ylab odamlarni bog'laydi. Internetga ulanish orqali foydalanuvchilar joylashuvidan qat'i nazar muloqot qilishlari mumkin, bu esa xalqaro darajada munosabatlar o'rnatish va hamkorlik qilishni osonlashtiradi.
whyMessaging.privacyDesc: Zamonaviy messenjer platformalari foydalanuvchilarga o'z ma'lumotlari va suhbatlarini nazorat qilish imkonini berishga qaratilgan. Shifrlash, maxfiylik sozlamalari va xabarni boshqarish kabi funksiyalar foydalanuvchilarga ishonch bilan muloqot qilish imkonini beradi.
whyMessaging.futureDesc: Messenjer sun'iy intellekt yordamidagi javoblar, tarjima va multimedia almashish kabi yangi funksiyalar bilan rivojlanishda davom etmoqda. Texnologiya rivojlanishi bilan messenjer platformalari yanada qudratli va ko'p qirrali bo'lib boradi.
whyMessaging.outro: Chatforia shu tamoyillarni nazarda tutgan holda yaratilgan bo'lib, bog'langan dunyo uchun tez, xavfsiz va foydalanuvchiga qulay xabar almashish tajribasini taklif etadi.

global.title: Global muloqotning kelajagi
global.intro: So'nggi bir necha o'n yillikda muloqot tez sur'atlar bilan rivojlandi. Ilgari telefon qo'ng'iroqlari yoki yuzma-yuz uchrashuvlar talab qilingan ishlar endi xabar almashish platformalari orqali tez bajarilishi mumkin. Texnologiya rivojlanishda davom etar ekan, global muloqot tezroq, kengroq va inklyuzivroq bo'lib bormoqda.
global.barriersDesc: Kommunikatsiyadagi eng katta o'zgarishlardan biri geografik to'siqlarning kamayishidir. Endi odamlar dunyo bo'ylab deyarli real vaqtda bir-biri bilan bog'lana oladi. Shaxsiy suhbatlar, ishbilarmonlik yoki hamkorlik bo'lsin, xabar almashish platformalari masofani ancha kam cheklovchi qilgan.
global.translationDesc: Til an'anaviy ravishda global muloqotdagi eng katta to'siqlardan biri bo'lib kelgan. Bugun, o'rnatilgan tarjima vositalari bu bo'shliqni to'ldirishga yordam beradi. Chatforia kabi platformalar foydalanuvchilarga turli tillarda gaplashsalar ham osonroq muloqot qilish imkonini beradi, bu esa bog'lanish va tushunish uchun yangi imkoniyatlar yaratadi.
global.realtimeDesc: Tezlik zamonaviy muloqotni shakllantiruvchi asosiy omil hisoblanadi. Foydalanuvchilar xabarlar tez yetkazilishini kutishadi, va zamonaviy infratuzilma bu kutishni qo'llab-quvvatlaydi. Real vaqtli xabar almashish yanada tabiiy va ravon suhbatlarni ta'minlaydi.
global.privacyDesc: Kommunikatsiya tobora raqamli tus olayotgan sari maxfiylik va xavfsizlik muhimligi ortib bormoqda. Foydalanuvchilar suhbatlarining himoyalanganiga ishonch hosil qilishni xohlashadi. Shifrlash va foydalanuvchi boshqaradigan sozlamalar kabi xususiyatlar yanada xavfsiz muloqot tajribasini ta'minlashga yordam beradi.
global.futureDesc: Global kommunikatsiyaning kelajagi ehtimol sun'iy intellekt yordamidagi xabar almashish, takomillashtirilgan tarjima va yaxshilangan foydalanuvchi tajribalari kabi yanada ilg'or vositalarni o'z ichiga oladi. Texnologiya rivojlanishi bilan kommunikatsiya yanada intuitiv va qulay bo'lib boraveradi.
global.outro: Chatforia kabi platformalar bu o'zgarishning bir qismi bo'lib, odamlarga tillar va chegaralar bo'ylab osonroq bog'lanishga yordam beradi.

index.title: Chatforia Blogi
index.intro: Muloqot, onlayn xavfsizlik va xabar almashish texnologiyasi butun dunyo bo'ylab odamlarni qanday bog'layotgani haqidagi ma'lumotlarni o'rganing.

chatSafely.title: Qanday qilib onlayn xavfsiz suhbatlashish
chatSafely.intro: Onlayn muloqot butun dunyo bo'ylab odamlar bilan bog'lanishni ilgari hech qachon bo'lmagan darajada osonlashtirdi. Do'stlarga xabar yuborayotgan bo'lsangiz, yangi odamlar bilan tanishayotgan bo'lsangiz yoki professional hamkorlik qilayotgan bo'lsangiz, xabar almashish platformalari kundalik hayotda muhim rol o'ynaydi. Biroq, onlaynda xavfsiz bo'lish ham bog'lanish kabi muhimdir.

personalInfo.title: Protect Your Personal Information
personalInfo.body: One of the most important rules of online safety is to avoid sharing sensitive personal information. This includes your home address, financial details, passwords, or any identifying information that could be misused. Even in casual conversations, it's best to be mindful of what you share and who you share it with.

safetyFeatures.title: Use Built-In Safety Features
safetyFeatures.body: Modern messaging platforms like Chatforia provide tools to help users stay safe. Features such as blocking, reporting, and privacy controls are designed to give users control over their experience. If someone behaves inappropriately or makes you uncomfortable, you should use these tools immediately.

scams.title: Be Aware of Scams
scams.body: Scammers often use messaging platforms to trick users into sharing personal information or sending money. Be cautious of messages that seem too good to be true, such as unexpected offers, urgent requests, or unfamiliar links. Always verify the identity of the person you're communicating with before taking any action.

responsibly.title: Communicate Responsibly
responsibly.body: Respectful communication helps create a safer environment for everyone. Avoid engaging in harmful or abusive conversations, and be mindful of how your words may affect others. Positive interactions contribute to a better experience for all users.

whySafety.title: Nega onlayn xavfsizlik muhim?
whySafety.body: Raqamli muloqot rivojlanishda davom etar ekan, xavfsizlik va ishonchni saqlash tobora muhimlashib bormoqda. Asosiy xavfsizlik qoidalariga rioya qilish va mavjud vositalardan foydalanish orqali foydalanuvchilar xabar almashishning afzalliklaridan bahramand bo'lishlari va xavflarni minimallashtirishlari mumkin.

chatSafely.conclusion: Onlayn xavfsiz bo'lish uchun murakkab texnik bilimlar talab etilmaydi — faqat xabardorlik, ehtiyotkorlik va to'g'ri qaror qobiliyati kifoya. To'g'ri odatlar bilan siz ishonch bilan muloqot qilishingiz va xavfsiz tarzda.

about.title: Chatforia haqida
about.description: Chatforia — bu oxir-oxirga shifrlash, tezkor tarjima va ovozli/video qo'ng'iroqlarni taklif etuvchi xavfsiz, ko'p tilli messenjerdir. Bizning missiyamiz sodda: odamlarga xavfsiz, maxfiy va tillararo bog'lanishda yordam berish.

values.privacy: Birinchi navbatda maxfiylik: standart bo'yicha oxir-oxirga shifrlash.
values.access: Hammasi uchun kirish: 100+ tilni avtomatik tarjima qilish.
values.control: Boshqaruv: yo'qoladigan xabarlar va o'qilganligi haqidagi kvitansiyalar ixtiyoriy.
values.control_aria: Control: Disappearing messages and read receipts are optional.

about.howDescription: Messages are encrypted on your device before they leave it. Translation, backups, and device sync are designed to minimize what our servers can see.
about.privacyDesc: End-to-end encryption and privacy controls are built into Chatforia from the start.
about.accessDesc: Chatforia helps people connect across languages, devices, and borders.
about.controlDesc: Choose how messages appear, when they disappear, and how your account stays protected.

press.title: Matbuot
press.contactLine: Ommaviy axborot vositalari so'rovlari uchun biz bilan bog'laning
press.boilerplateBody: Chatforia - bu maxfiylikni birinchi o'ringa qo'yadigan xabar almashish ilovasi bo'lib, u tillararo suhbatni muammosiz qiladi. Xabarlar end-to -xabarlar standart bo'yicha o'chib ketadigan shaklda yuboriladi, va o'rnatilgan tarjima funksiyasi 100+ tildan real vaqtda foydalanishni qo'llab-quvvatlaydi. Foydalanuvchilar xabarlarning o'chib ketishini yoqishi, o'qilganligi haqidagi ma'lumotni ixtiyoriy qilishi va qurilmalar o'rtasida sinxronlashtirishi mumkin. iOS, Android va veb-versiyada mavjud.
press.scanTip: Kompyuterda? Ilovani olish uchun telefoningiz bilan skanerlang.

careers.title: Careers
careers.intro: We’re a small founding team building Chatforia — a private, global messenger launching on web, iOS, and Android. If you care about privacy, encryption, and delightful user experiences, we’d love to hear from you.
careers.openRoles: Open founding roles: Lead Full-stack Engineer, Backend Engineer (Node.js), Frontend/Web Engineer (React), Mobile Engineer (iOS), Mobile Engineer (Android), DevOps/SRE, Security & Encryption Engineer, Telecom Engineer (Twilio + eSIM).
careers.apply: How to apply: Use the button below to email your resume and links.
careers.whyBullets:
• Help build the foundation of a new global messenger.
• Ship improvements used across web, iOS, and Android.
• Work directly with the founder on architecture and product direction.
• Own high-impact areas of the stack: messaging, voice, video, encryption, telecom, AI.
• Join at the beginning — before the user base scales.

intro.body: This Privacy Policy explains how Chatforia (“we”, “us”) collects, uses, and shares information when you use our apps and services. We design Chatforia to minimize the data we can access.

infoWeCollect.title: Information we collect
infoWeCollect.account: Account info (e.g., email/phone) to create and secure your account.
infoWeCollect.encrypted: Encrypted content (messages/calls) is end-to-end encrypted; we can’t read it.
infoWeCollect.diagnostics: Diagnostic/usage like crash logs, device type, or coarse analytics to improve performance.

sms.title: Mobile phone numbers and SMS
sms.body: If you choose to provide a mobile phone number, we use it to enable features such as account verification, login alerts, and user-to-user messaging via SMS where supported. We may send transactional SMS messages related to your account and activity on Chatforia. You can opt out of receiving SMS messages at any time by replying with a supported opt-out keyword (such as “STOP”) or by changing your notification preferences in the app. We do not sell your phone number or use it for unrelated marketing.

rights.title: Your rights
rights.body: Depending on your region (e.g., GDPR/UK GDPR/CPRA), you may request access, correction, deletion, or opt-out of certain processing. Contact: privacy@chatforia.com.

retention.title: Data retention & security
retention.body: We retain only what’s needed to operate the service and apply industry-standard security. E2E content can’t be decrypted by us.

refund.intro: At Chatforia, we strive to provide a high-quality service to all users. This Refund Policy outlines when refunds may be issued.

subscriptions.title: Subscriptions
subscriptions.body: Subscriptions are billed in advance on a recurring basis. You may cancel at any time through your account settings or the platform used to purchase.

eligibility.title: Refund Eligibility
eligibility.body: Refunds may be granted for duplicate charges, billing errors, or technical issues preventing access to paid features. All requests are reviewed case-by-case.

nonRefundable.title: Non-Refundable
nonRefundable.body: We generally do not provide refunds for unused time, partial subscription periods, or failure to cancel before renewal.

thirdParty.title: Third-Party Purchases

cookies.title: Cookie Settings
